q: Measuring developer toil vs. feature delivery
diagnostic: Toil is the work that scales linearly with system size and contributes zero business value. The Digital Vanguard agent would measure it as the ratio of maintenance commits to feature commits. A boardroom tracks this in real time.
answer: Toil is the work that scales linearly with system size and contributes zero business value. The Digital Vanguard agent would measure it as the ratio of maintenance commits to feature commits. A boardroom tracks this in real time.
description: R&D stagnation — the 'Maintenance Tax' eats the Innovation Budget. Engineers spend 80% on refactoring the refactor.
symptom: R&D budget grows, feature release cycle slows. $20M Series B spent on keeping the lights on.
